scenario.name: reg_xgbver_device_send
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=z9hG4bK[callId] From: <sip:34020000001320000001@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag02[callNumber] To: <sip:34020000001320000001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] REGISTER Contact: <sip:34020000001320000001@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: WVP-Test-Simulator-2022 Expires: 3600 X-GB-ver: 2.0

REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=z9hG4bK[callId] From: <sip:34020000001320000001@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag02[callNumber] To: <sip:34020000001320000001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] REGISTER Contact: <sip:34020000001320000001@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Authorization: [authentication username=34020000001320000001 password=test12345] Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: WVP-Test-Simulator-2022 Expires: 3600 X-GB-ver: 2.0
